title: Deepslatified Bedrock
description: Replaces the default bedrock texture with a darker deepslate version for better visual consistency with deepslate.
body:
# Bedrock to Darker Deepslate
Replaces bedrock with a darker deepslate texture for a more consistent underground look.

# Images:
![This image shows the combination of Bedrock and Deepslate together (with the resourcepack enabled)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8ac64c03252f83292cc89191f1acdf14a73b826_0.webp)
**With resource pack enabled**

![This image shows the combination of Bedrock and Deepslate together (with the resourcepack disabled)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ecd9ecebf0e5003edb1ea45f5593d2a12cac498_0.webp)
**Without resource pack enabled**
